## Investment View
LBIRD scores 76/100 as a constructive_bullish setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture and ENTRY_READY status, with 2 constructive versus 0 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 0 adverse effects. - Thesis: The setup is actionable only while the breakout level continues to hold and recent constructive signals, including the broader market overlay when relevant, keep getting follow-through.
